title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 265.471 - Rules, Federal Meat Inspection Act
text:
265.471.  Rules, Federal Meat Inspection Act. — The director shall promulgate rules and regulations consistent with and equal to the Federal Meat Inspection Act, the Federal Poultry Products Inspection Act, and all related federal regulations and shall adopt such rules and regulations as necessary to implement the inspection programs authorized under sections 265.300 to 265.470.
(L. 2004 H.B. 1192 merged with S.B. 740, et al. § 265.475)
